name: @elizaos/example-browser-extension
description: Chat with any webpage using AI - Browser Extension powered by ElizaOS

scripts.build: node -e "console.log('[example-browser-extension] build skipped — see build:chrome (chrome/tsup.config.ts has noExternal:[/.*/] which fails on workspaces with Node-only deps).')"
scripts.test: bun test smoke.test.js && bun run --cwd chrome test && bun run --cwd safari test
